item.title: App Store Review Prompt
item.intent: The review prompt must appear at the right moment — when the user is happy and engaged, never before. One shot, never again.
item.description: Per PRODUCT.md §12. Prompt for App Store review only after: 7 days of active use AND 10+ AI feature uses. Uses SKStoreReviewController. Prompt appears at most once, ever. Timing tracked via on-device aggregate counters (FEAT-060). Never interrupts active editing — shown on return to home screen or after completing an AI action.
acceptanceCriteria: Review prompt does not appear before 7 days of active use AND 10+ AI uses
Review prompt appears at most once per user, ever
If user has not used AI features, prompt never appears regardless of time
